[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000001000 1
4 110111111 8
5 010111010 5
6 101000010 3
7 000111010 4
